title: Website Relaunch — Public Beta
body:
## v1.0.0 — Website Relaunch (Public Beta)

### Added
- New homepage hero wired to the CMS
- Responsive primary navigation with mobile drawer
- Blog index with category filters

### Changed
- Migrated content to a build-time CMS prefetch pipeline

### Fixed
- Layout shift on the hero image (improved CLS)

_All data in this release is synthetic demo content._
